title: Tao Te Ching 25
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 25 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 25 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: There was something formless and perfect before the universe was born. Silent and void, it stands alone and does not change.
